text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 2 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
